speaker: charlie
text: Right, sport time! The Fijian Drua have absolutely stunned the rugby world, beating the ACT Brumbies in Canberra over the weekend. First time they've knocked over the Brumbies on their home patch.

speaker: alice
text: What a performance! The boys from Fiji dedicated the win to their late president, Ratu Epeli Naletikau. You could see the emotion on their faces - playing with real heart and pride.

speaker: charlie
text: Super Rugby's heading into a massive few weeks with the trans-Tasman showdown coming up. The Drua are showing the Pacific Island teams can really mix it with anyone when they're firing.
